mapper.sql: id, name, unit, stock_qty, min_stock, unit_cost, supplier, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ingredients ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ingredients (name, unit, stock_qty, min_stock, unit_cost, supplier) VALUES (#{name}, #{unit}, #{stock_qty}, #{min_stock}, #{unit_cost}, #{supplier})
mapper.update: UPDATE ingredients SET name = #{name}, unit = #{unit}, stock_qty = #{stock_qty}, min_stock = #{min_stock}, unit_cost = #{unit_cost}, supplier = #{supplier} WHERE id = #{id}
